title: Strength SMP S1
description: A plugin inspired by the Strength SMP, made by pipewasxd.
body:
# Strength SMP
- Each time you kill a player, you gain +1 Strength (attack damage), and every time you’re killed by another player, you lose -1 Strength.

![dqs hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa2a1cd5c606832fde09d0e475aeafbfa136d5f_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://dqshosting.vercel.app

</details>


## 🔹Features
- The maximum strength a player can reach is +5 and the minimum is -5 by default — both fully configurable.

- You can also craft a strength item using a special recipe, which can be consumed to instantly gain +1 strength (adjustable in the configs).

# Strength Item Recipe
![Strength Item Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/099b7936faba9ecb771734e30fb346fab53cb98c.png)
